weapon.railgun.strengths: Highest single-target damage in the game with unmatched armor penetration. Penetrator rounds ignore shields and hit weak points directly, making it devastating against heavily armored targets.
weapon.railgun.bestFor: Boss-killing and destroying heavily armored Upior targets at range. Essential for Storm Dive missions where you face elite enemies with thick armor plating.
weapon.railgun.tip1: Charge your shots fully. Partial charges deal significantly less damage
weapon.railgun.tip2: Aim for weak points to deal critical damage that bypasses even heavy armor
weapon.railgun.tip3: Use from maximum range where enemies cannot easily retaliate
weapon.heavycannon.strengths: Massive area-of-effect explosive damage that obliterates groups of enemies. The splash radius is the largest of any weapon, and its damage scales with direct hits.
weapon.heavycannon.bestFor: Clearing large groups of weaker Upiors and breaking through enemy defensive positions. Ideal for Voyage mode encounters with swarm-type enemies.
weapon.heavycannon.tip1: Lead your targets. The projectile has travel time at longer ranges
weapon.heavycannon.tip2: Fire at the ground near enemies to catch them in the blast radius even if you miss
weapon.heavycannon.tip3: Save your ammo for groups. Single targets are not cost-effective
weapon.leviathan.strengths: Creates persistent denial zones that enemies cannot pass through. Area denial fields last for extended durations, controlling the battlefield and funneling enemies into kill zones.
weapon.leviathan.bestFor: Defending extraction points and creating safe zones for your crew. Perfect for controlling chokepoints and protecting the Dune Fortress during stationary operations.
weapon.leviathan.tip1: Place denial zones at chokepoints to funnel enemies into your crew fire
weapon.leviathan.tip2: Stack multiple Leviathan fields for increased damage in overlapping areas
weapon.leviathan.tip3: Use as a retreat tool. Drop a field behind you to block pursuing enemies
weapon.rifle.strengths: Reliable sustained damage at medium to long range with high accuracy. Consistent output and manageable recoil make it the most versatile player weapon for any situation.
weapon.rifle.bestFor: General-purpose combat in any game mode. The go-to weapon for medium-range engagements and the safest choice when you do not know what enemies you will face.
weapon.rifle.tip1: Control your fire rate. Spamming reduces accuracy significantly
weapon.rifle.tip2: Use medium range as your sweet spot. Too close and you are vulnerable, too far and damage drops
weapon.rifle.tip3: Prioritize headshots on humanoid Upiors for bonus damage
weapon.shotgun.strengths: Devastating close-range burst damage that can eliminate targets in a single blast. Spread pattern is forgiving at close range, making it easy to hit fast-moving targets.
weapon.shotgun.bestFor: Close-quarters combat inside structures and underground areas. Best used by Light Trampler pilots who can close distance quickly and deliver point-blank blasts.
weapon.shotgun.tip1: Get within point-blank range for maximum damage. One blast can kill most standard enemies
weapon.shotgun.tip2: Use corners and doorways to ambush enemies at close range
weapon.shotgun.tip3: Switch to your sidearm immediately after firing if the target survives
weapon.pistol.strengths: Lightweight sidearm with fast draw speed and unlimited reserve ammo. The perfect backup weapon, quick to switch to when your primary runs dry mid-fight.
weapon.pistol.bestFor: Emergency backup when your primary weapon is reloading or out of ammo. Also useful for finishing off weakened targets without wasting primary ammunition.
weapon.pistol.tip1: Keep it as a finisher. Do not engage fresh enemies with a pistol
weapon.pistol.tip2: Use while repositioning. It is accurate on the move unlike heavier weapons
weapon.pistol.tip3: Conserve primary ammo by using the pistol on easy low-threat targets
